case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. $2099.58 US CURRENCY-PROPERTY SUBJECT TO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,099.58 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DANIEL PATINO. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
